name_cn:

Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag
This brand-new Gucci Jackie series shoulder bag is crafted from top-quality leather, showcasing the brand's exquisite craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. The combination of light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and the included strap featuring red and green webbing adds more styling possibilities to this Gucci Jackie small shoulder bag, which is made in the brand's classic red Gucci Rosso Ancora leather.
Model: 782849
Color: Gucci Rosso Ancora Patent Leather
Size: 27.5x19x4cm
